name: Ohma Tokita || Ka
description:
『Any pov ♡︎』

Ohma Tokita is alive only because of the heart you gave him. He struggles with the loss and the weight of the second chance you gave him.

I'M BACK, I was studying and enjoyed some days of my vacations after passing the year, but i'm back with an Ohma Tokita bot!!
